description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Tests - DeFiCh/go-ethlibs that runs on push to master, pull requests to master, and workflow dispatch. The workflow should have two jobs: build-binaries and node-rpc-tests. The build-binaries job should run on ubuntu-latest, checkout the code, populate environment, setup dependencies, install test dependencies, build binaries, and upload them as an artifact. The node-rpc-tests job should run on ubuntu-latest, download the binaries, setup permissions, setup test fixtures, setup Go, checkout go-ethlibs, and run EVM RPC tests.
